features.name: shift operation with negative shift amount in localparam
features.description: Code should include a left shift operation with negative shift amount in a localparam context, where the negative shift results from subtracting 1 from a parameter value that could be zero

features.name: power-of-2 computation via left shift with parameter input
features.description: Code should include a function that computes power of 2 using left shift, where the function input is a parameter that can be zero, causing the shift amount to become negative
